about_item: Dogs and Humans Can Share: Create a safe haven for your furry friend, or use it as a side table or nightstand with charging station while enhancing your home decor. This 2-in-1 dog crate furniture piece meets both you and your dog's needs

Built-In Charging Station: Equipped with 2 AC outlets, 1 USB-A port, and 1 USB-C port, this dog kennel can charge up to 4 devices simultaneously, from your phone and tablet to your furry friend's electronic essentials like smart collar or electronic toys

Space-Saving Flip-Up Door: The transparent acrylic door of the dog crate table features a flip-up design that tucks under the top, saving space and preventing bumps. When closed, it offers your pet a clear view of the surroundings, easing their anxiety

Safe and Secure: Crafted with premium boards and acrylic, this dog crate end table ensures a safe retreat for your furry friend. Unlike traditional wire crates, the smooth board design minimizes potential hazards and enhances comfort

Spacious Room Inside: With an interior space of 22.8" x 29.9" x 21.3", the dog cage furniture is perfect for dogs up to 45 lb, such as French Bulldogs, Corgis, and Dachshunds, to train or rest comfortably. Please measure your dog to ensure a perfect fit

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate visually appealing and appreciate its spacious design, with one mentioning it can fit two dog beds. Moreover, the product is easy to assemble and features a functional door and charging station that works well. Additionally, they find it sturdy and safe for pets, with one customer noting it's perfect for small to midsize dogs.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for light use
authors_reviews.text: Easy to put together. It's perfect for supervised crate time (when we're eating dinner) but I wouldn't leave my dog in it and then leave the house because of the materials and ability to chew through them. If that's your plan for it then I would get something sturdier. Think that would be common sense but I guess not reading some of the reviews! It looks very nice and perfect for my 25 pound dog. I added a big plush bed (from bedsure also on Amazon) and she Ioves hanging out and napping with the door open.
authors_reviews.author: britmar12

authors_reviews.title: It’s like an end table you can put your dog in
authors_reviews.text: This is such a cool dog crate! What a creative way to keep your dog away! It took about an hour to put together but it feels sturdy enough and it’s fairly big but perfect for my 11lb Maltese. I love the charging part and the the fact that it’s more aesthetically pleasing than a wire crate. I also love that it doubles as an end table. My dog doesn’t chew things so I don’t have to worry about that and the inside material seems like it’s easy to clean. Happy purchase:)
authors_reviews.author: Jennifer Kay

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!
authors_reviews.text: This piece of furniture is fantastic!! I was tired of having a wired crate in my living room. This looks great and I have peace of mind knowing my pup is safe. I was able to put it together by myself and it took about an hour. Definitely worth it!!
authors_reviews.author: Felicia

authors_reviews.title: Stylish Furniture Crate: Beautiful for Your Room, but Read This Before Buying for Large Breeds
authors_reviews.text: This dog crate is absolutely beautiful and looks like a high-end piece of furniture in my room. It feels very safe for pets, but there are a few things to keep in mind.I have a standard Golden Doodle who loved it initially, but he grew so fast that he rejected the crate by 5 months old. I would highly recommend this specifically for small-sized dogs or breeds that don't grow quite as rapidly.One operational note: you have to make your pet wait until the flip-up door is fully opened and secured. If they rush out too early, there is a chance the door could fall on their head or body. Overall, it's a great, stylish product if you have the right-sized pet!
authors_reviews.author: Cvan

authors_reviews.title: Great for recovering dog
authors_reviews.text: I ordered this crate for my other dog- but then my other one got hit by a car and it is now his. It’s very roomy and comfortable for him. I really like the clear acrylic door. I can easily see if he needs immediate help. It is also reducing his anxiety because he can still see his surroundings. Another thing, it’s been good for keeping my cats and other dog from rough housing with him. He is well protected. It can easily fit two dogs beds and blankets. The charging station works perfectly. The amount of table top space is also nice!
authors_reviews.author: Ashlee Leonard

authors_reviews.title: Great style and size
authors_reviews.text: Very nice and stylish crate, it looks super nice in my living room and best of all my mini Dachshund loves it.
authors_reviews.author: Ligia L Bedoya

authors_reviews.title: Quality is questionable.
authors_reviews.text: Nice design but the screws don’t tighten properly. Be careful moving it around as it probably won’t last for this reason.
authors_reviews.author: Wozza

authors_reviews.title: Buy it!
authors_reviews.text: Super cute crate!! My dog loves it, great for small to midsize dogs! The charger station works great too! We loved it! Buy it!!
authors_reviews.author: yezenia
